name: libreoffice-sdbc-hsqldb
title: libreoffice-sdbc-hsqldb
summary: embedded HSQLDB SDBC driver for LibreOffice
description:
embedded HSQLDB SDBC driver for LibreOffice
LibreOffice is a full-featured office productivity suite that provides
a near drop-in replacement for Microsoft(R) Office.
.
The HSQLDB SDBC Driver allows one to use the HSQLDB embedded database from
LibreOffice without any wrapper layer such as ODBC or JDBC.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libreoffice-sdbc-hsqldb because embedded HSQLDB SDBC driver for LibreOffice.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libreoffice-sdbc-hsqldb as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libreoffice-sdbc-hsqldb with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libreoffice-sdbc-hsqldb --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
